name: OJsys, Inc.
summary: OJsys, Inc. develops and manufactures broadcasting receivers. Its products include satellite receiver, terrestrial receiver, IP set-top boxes, media center PC devices, and receiver-plus-DVD-RW combos. It markets its products to Europe, Japan, the Middle East, Asia, and the United States. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
